records.question: Where is the cinema in County Wicklow with a capacity of 1100 that shows films directed by Bill Schreiner featuring at least 2 in the season, with tickets priced at most 12.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE film.number_in_season >= 2 AND schedule.price <= 12.99 AND cinema.location = 'County Wicklow' AND film.directed_by = 'Bill Schreiner' AND cinema.capacity = 1100
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cinema.Cinema_ID
FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.Cinema_ID = schedule.Cinema_ID
JOIN film ON schedule.Film_ID = film.Film_ID
WHERE cinema.Location = 'County Wicklow'
AND cinema.Capacity = 1100
AND schedule.Price <= 12.99
AND film.Number_in_season >= 2
AND film.Directed_by = 'Bill Schreiner'

records.question: Which cinemas with a capacity of exactly 1100 have showings on 21 May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
WHERE schedule.date = '21 May' AND cinema.capacity = 1100
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cinema.Cinema_ID 
FROM cinema 
JOIN schedule ON cinema.Cinema_ID = schedule.Cinema_ID 
WHERE cinema.Capacity = 1100 AND schedule.Date = '21 May'

records.question: Which Oriel cinemas that opened exactly in 2013 have a capacity of at most 330 and offer no more than 5 show times on 19 May with ticket prices at least 15.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
WHERE cinema.capacity <= 330 AND schedule.price >= 15.99 AND schedule.date = '19 May' AND cinema.openning_year = 2013 AND schedule.show_times_per_day <= 5 AND cinema.name = 'Oriel'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cinema.Cinema_ID 
FROM cinema 
JOIN schedule ON cinema.Cinema_ID = schedule.Cinema_ID 
WHERE cinema.Capacity <= 330 
AND cinema.Openning_year = 2013 
AND cinema.Name = 'Oriel' 
AND schedule.Price >= 15.99 
AND schedule.Date = '19 May' 
AND schedule.Show_times_per_day <= 5

records.question: Which cinemas named Codling in County Wicklow that opened in 2010 with a capacity of 1100 are showing films with number in season at most 1 and rank in series at most 26, where there are exactly 5 show times per day?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE cinema.location = 'County Wicklow' AND cinema.name = 'Codling' AND cinema.openning_year = 2010 AND cinema.capacity = 1100 AND film.number_in_season <= 1 AND film.rank_in_series <= 26 AND schedule.show_times_per_day = 5
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cinema.Cinema_ID
FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.Cinema_ID = schedule.Cinema_ID
JOIN film ON schedule.Film_ID = film.Film_ID
WHERE cinema.Location = 'County Wicklow'
  AND cinema.Name = 'Codling'
  AND cinema.Openning_year = 2010
  AND cinema.Capacity = 1100
  AND schedule.Show_times_per_day = 5
  AND film.Number_in_season <= 1
  AND film.Rank_in_series <= 26

records.question: Which Codling cinemas in County Wicklow have a capacity of at most 1100?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
WHERE cinema.location = 'County Wicklow' AND cinema.capacity <= 1100 AND cinema.name = 'Codling'
records.pred_sql: SELECT cinema.Cinema_ID FROM cinema WHERE Location = 'County Wicklow' AND Capacity <= 1100 AND Name = 'Codling'

records.question: What cinemas named Mount Callan opened exactly in 2011?
records.gold_sql:

WHERE cinema.openning_year = 2011 AND cinema.name = 'Mount Callan'
